LanguageData.UB_SNS_DerangedArtist.title: Deranged artist
LanguageData.UB_SNS_DerangedArtist.description: [PAWN_nameDef] made a living selling seemingly innocent paintings in [PAWN_possessive] own little shop. Unbeknownst to the public at large, most of [PAWN_nameDef]'s art were secretly the final resting place of their murder victims. By the time authorities had figured this out, [PAWN_nameDef] was already long gone.
